content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.36% with mixed sector action — Auto/Metal/Pharma firm, Realty weak. India VIX at 18 reflects elevated but stable nervousness. Strong stock-specific earnings reactions today (BHEL, ADANIPORTS, BANDHANBNK, M&M, LALPATHLAB) suggest a stock-pickers tape rather than a directional index move. With 51m to close, focus is on managing existing book — most positions are at 0 days held with fresh earnings catalysts already digested.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23880,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent. +6.2% unrealized; current SL 1029 already at breakeven-plus zone, ~1.5% below CMP 1045 — proper trail gap. CMP holding above VWAP 1044.97; daily MACD bullish, ICICI Sec target Rs 1350. Keeping SL/target unchanged — no MODIFY churn needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact. Gold still in uptrend on Fed/geopolitical narrative; ETF -2.3% but holding above 200-SMA 107.26 and SL 119 (~2.6% below CMP 122.19). Hedge value > exit value here."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1715 to 1718 (above entry 1700, locking in ~1% on the position). CMP 1735.70, +4.73% intraday on all-time high breakout post-Q4. New SL 1718 sits ~1.0% below CMP — meets trail-gap discipline (≥1% below LTP). Q4 cargo 500MMT milestone, MOFSL Buy 1900. Target 1820 unchanged (R:R from new SL still ~5:1 to target)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held thesis: April record sales +33% YoY. Stock recovered intraday from 13360 low to 13480 (+1.25%). SL 13400 just 0.6% below CMP — already tight; thesis intact, let the trade work. Margin compression overhang noted but volume momentum dominates near-term. No MODIFY: SL already appropriate, loosening would breach risk floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 205.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 204 → 205 (above entry 209? No — entry was 209, CMP 207.49, so still slight loss). Actually keeping SL at 204 is appropriate; raising to 205 is a 0.5% tighten — within micro-adjust threshold. RECONSIDERING: change to HOLD to avoid micro-adjust violation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% unrealized. Strong defence theme +6.48% on day. Q4 results May 14 — that's ~7 sessions away, OUTSIDE the 3-session binary-event window, so HOLD acceptable. SL 4555 is ~1.4% below CMP 4619.90 — already trailed appropriately. Will reassess closer to May 14 for event-trim."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% unrealized. Q4 already out (PAT 2.5x), faded from intraday high 388 → 374. Bearish engulfing on Apr 29 daily is a caution flag but FY26 order book Rs 2.4 trillion strong. SL 372 is 0.7% below CMP 374.55 — tight but appropriate given fade. Let it work to SL or recover; no MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results out TODAY: PAT +124% YoY, FY26 pre-sales record Rs 8,135 cr, net debt negative. Intraday faded from 1577 high to 1458 — classic sell-the-news on a 79x P/E name. SL 1420 is 2.6% below CMP — appropriate breathing room. Conference call at 5pm IST may swing tomorrow. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7300.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 6850 → 6900 (entry breakeven). CMP 6997.50 (+1.4%), 7.7x volume institutional accumulation, Q4 EBITDA +103%, margin +992bps, CDMO +61%. SL 6900 sits 1.4% below CMP — meets trail-gap discipline. Locks in entry-level capital protection on a high-conviction breakout name approaching 52w high 7200. Target 7300 unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1029 (above entry 984 by ~4.6%), profit locked. Daily structure intact above all SMAs."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL 119 is 2.6% below CMP — within tolerance. Geopolitical/Fed setup supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH breakout on Q4; trail SL just above entry, 1% below CMP, lets winner run to 1820 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 already 0.6% below CMP. Intraday recovered from low; thesis intact on record April sales."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 is 1.6% below CMP 207.49 — appropriate. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, brokerage upgrades. Position now back to slight green; let it work to 220."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 14 — 7 sessions out; will revisit at T-3. SL 4555 ~1.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "Faded post-Q4; SL 372 (0.7% below CMP) tight but in range. Either bounces or we exit on SL — no need to widen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; intraday fade is sell-news. Concall 5pm may set tomorrow's tone. SL 2.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock entry breakeven on 7.7x volume institutional breakout setup."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong post-earnings names today (M&M PAT+42%, ADANIGREEN PAT+72%/Moody's upgrade, LALPATHLAB +12%, WOCKPHARMA +9.5%, VEDL +11% post-demerger, TATATECH +7.3%) all show good prints but most have already gapped/extended intraday with fades from highs (LALPATHLAB 1582→1534, BHEL 388→374, ADANIPORTS 1757→1735). Sell-the-news fade pattern is the dominant tape today — chasing now is buying the high tick. Will revisit fresh entries tomorrow once gaps consolidate. ADANIGREEN noted as Adani-cluster risk with held ADANIPORTS — would defer regardless. M&M is cleaner but already hold MARUTI in Auto sector — adding M&M would push Auto cluster weight up uncomfortably given MARUTI is underwater.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 49% deployed across 9 names — within soft target zone, cash 51% provides flexibility. Today's tape: holding all 9 positions through Q4 prints and trailing SLs on the two clear winners (ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR). Two MODIFYs only — both meet 1% trail-gap and tighten-only rules. Risk on book is contained: every SL within 0.6-2.6% of CMP. With 51m to close on a -0.36% Nifty day, no rationale to chase fresh entries into post-earnings extensions. Tomorrow will reassess BHEL/MARUTI/BANDHANBNK trail levels and any breakdowns. Defence/HAL pre-earnings (May 14) flagged for event-discipline review at T-3 (i.e., next Friday)."
}
